name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
CalorieMate helps you track daily calories.

• Start Tracking — log a meal (manual, food database, or photo)
• Today's Log — see what you've eaten and what's left
• Edit Entry — change or remove a log line
• Export CSV — download your history
• Reminders — meal prompts and a daily summary
• Settings — target, timezone, profile

Tap /start anytime to open the menu. Send a meal photo for an experimental estimate.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
